name: Doctors For You
missionStatement: To provide need-based healthcare to the most vulnerable and underserved communities in India and abroad.
organizationDescription: A healthcare NGO deploying doctors in disaster zones, remote areas and medical deserts across India.
description: Deploys medical professionals in remote and disaster-affected areas across India and internationally.

name: Jan Swasthya Sahyog (JSS)
missionStatement: To provide primary healthcare to tribal and rural communities in Chhattisgarh.
organizationDescription: A rural health initiative running hospitals and community health programs in Chhattisgarh's tribal belt.
description: Provides low-cost rural healthcare in tribal areas of Chhattisgarh.

name: Médecins Sans Frontières (MSF) India
missionStatement: Providing independent, impartial medical humanitarian assistance to those in greatest need.
organizationDescription: International humanitarian medical NGO working in conflict zones and medically underserved regions.
description: Delivers emergency medical aid in conflict and crisis situations across India and globally.
